title: World-Systems Analysis: An Introduction
author: Immanuel Wallerstein
rationale: The foundational single-volume introduction to world-systems analysis by its creator. Chosen as the root text for global society and world systems because it provides the most accessible and comprehensive statement of the analytical framework that reoriented social science away from nation-states toward the capitalist world-economy as the unit of analysis. No understanding of global stratification, core-periphery dynamics, or historical sociology is complete without this text.
